---
name: Feature Enhancement
about: Improve or extend an existing feature
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the enhancement.

## Existing Feature

Which feature or mechanic is being improved? Link to relevant code, docs, or a prior issue if applicable.

## Current Behavior

Describe what the feature currently does.

## Proposed Change

Describe what should change and why it would be an improvement. Include before/after comparisons where helpful.

## Affected Domains

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Agent (behavior, decision-making, personality)
- [ ] Faction (formation, membership, diplomacy)
- [ ] World / Grid (terrain, resources, spatial logic)
- [ ] Actions (new or modified agent actions)
- [ ] Rendering (visuals, canvas, camera)
- [ ] UI (inspector, event log, controls)
- [ ] Persistence (save/load)
- [ ] Simulation loop (tick timing, update order)

## Risks / Trade-offs

Any regressions, balance concerns, or performance implications to be aware of.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, data, or references that support the proposed change.
